summary: Embedded safe local artifact previews into Path Map Event Proof so selected trail events can show compact packet/report context without leaving the static dashboard.

queries: document preview in activity feed dashboard UX pattern
artifact preview detail panel dashboard UX
inline document preview master detail dashboard UI
pattern_notes: Artifact previews should show compact content, labels, metadata, and nearby actions without replacing the user's context.
Activity feeds are easier to scan when selected records expose proof snippets inline.
Master-detail layouts support deeper inspection when the detail panel remains responsive and bounded.

data_inputs: local text-like files inside the repo root
ui_contract: Resolve artifact paths only inside the repo root and skip URLs, missing files, and unsupported/binary extensions.
Embed optional artifactPreview objects with label, kind, up to four cleaned preview lines, and truncation state.
Render Artifact Preview inside the Event Proof lens only when preview lines exist.
Keep previews compact, wrapped, and compatible with the static browser-only dashboard.
Preserve existing trail navigation and selected event behavior.

red_route.evidence: Before implementation, the selected event had a local artifact path but no .path-artifact-preview panel, no preview lines, and 0 snapshot trail events with artifactPreview.

green_route.evidence: The Event Proof lens rendered a 4-line Artifact Preview for packet.md; stepping to NEWER swapped the lens and preview to marketplace-readiness-matrix-20260614 with no browser errors or failed requests.

responsive.evidence: All tested viewports rendered the preview after a neighboring event step, kept document width equal to viewport width, and reported no bad rectangles, console errors, or failed requests.

snapshot_data.evidence: digital_products_templates_plugins regenerated with 38 trail events containing artifactPreview.
